nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Changesets configuration controlling changelog generation, versioning access, and ignored packages for this pnpm monorepo.

nodes.name: .gitleaksignore
nodes.summary: Gitleaks ignore file listing known false-positive secret fingerprints to suppress in security scanning.

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: npm/pnpm registry configuration controlling package resolution, hoisting, and token settings for the monorepo.

nodes.name: railway.ts
nodes.summary: Railway infrastructure-as-code configuration defining helper functions to compose cron service deployments with build and deploy settings.

nodes.name: cronService
nodes.summary: Composes a full Railway cron service definition from name, root directory, cron schedule, and environment variables.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns for the understand-anything knowledge graph tool, excluding generated artifacts, cache files, and test fixtures from analysis.

nodes.name: deploy.config.json
nodes.summary: Central deployment configuration mapping environment names to Supabase project IDs, Railway service IDs, and smoke-test endpoints for staging and production.

nodes.name: cron-runner.sh
nodes.summary: Shared shell script template for Railway cron services that handles enable-checking, cron job invocation, result logging, and cleanup via the log-cron-run edge function.

nodes.name: cron-runner.sh
nodes.summary: Cron runner script for the cleanup-stale job, invoking the cleanup-stale-runs edge function on schedule with logging and enable-check guards.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Minimal package manifest for the cleanup-stale cron service, providing name and version metadata for the Railway workspace.

nodes.summary: Cron runner script for the db-maintenance job, invoking the db-maintenance edge function on schedule with logging and enable-check guards.
